.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(31, 29, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(38, 35, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(31, 29, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(38, 35, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(31, 29, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(31, 29, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(38, 35, 58) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(31, 29, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(25, 23, 36) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(33, 32, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(33, 32, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(33, 32, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
